title: CNPC+ Gecko Addon
description: Add GeckoLib functionality, animations, and Custom Models to CustomNPC+
body: **CNPC+ Gecko Addon** is a [Minecraft](https://minecraft.net/) mod, that gives compatibility between Unofficial GeckoLib and CustomNPC+ on 1.7.10. You must use a MIXIN Mod to support this (UniMixins). This allows you to import Blockbench models into CustomNPC+ using CustomModel. ---------------- [![Download CustomNPC+](https://img.shields.io/badge/CustomNPC+-0081CB?style=for-the-badge&logo=material-ui&logoColor=white)](https://modrinth.com/mod/customnpc-plus) [![CNPC+ Armourers Addon](https://img.shields.io/badge/CNPC+_AW_Addon-0081CB?style=for-the-badge&logo=material-ui&logoColor=white)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cnpc-armorers-workshop-addon) [![CNPC+ Gecko Addon](https://img.shields.io/badge/CNPC+_Gecko_Addon-0081CB?style=for-the-badge&logo=material-ui&logoColor=white)](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cnpc-custom-model-addon) [![Download MPM+](https://img.shields.io/badge/MorePlayerModels+-0081CB?style=for-the-badge&logo=material-ui&logoColor=white)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/moreplayermodels-plus) [![Download PluginMod](https://img.shields.io/badge/Plugin_Mod-0081CB?style=for-the-badge&logo=material-ui&logoColor=white)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-plugin-mod) [![ResistanceX](https://img.shields.io/badge/Resistance_X-0081CB?style=for-the-badge&logo=material-ui&logoColor=white)](https://www.modrinth.com/plugin/resistance-x-forge) ---------------- ### ⬇️ Downloads - **Modrinth**: [Here](https://modrinth.com/mod/customnpc-plus-gecko-addon) - **CurseForge**: [Here](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cnpc-custom-model-addon) ### 🔹 Installation To install this mod you will be required to have both CustomNPC+ and Unofficial GeckoLib installed with a valid Mixin Mod. Ex. UniMixins or GTNH Mixins. I highly suggest UniMixins. Additionally, you will need to download the Unofficial Backport of GeckoLib for 1.7.10: [GeckoLib Unofficial](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/geckolib-unofficial-1-7-10) ### ❓ Features: - Custom Model Entity - Animations for Custom Models > Hurt > Attack > Walk > Melee > Idle - Scripting for Custom Animation calling - Client / Server Sync for Blockbench Models - Tint and Hitbox Modification compatibility for Custom Models - Animation File and Animation Selector built straight into CustomNPC+ Display Menu ### How to begin? To begin with adding a GeckoLib Model to CustomNPC+, head over to your Minecraft directory and add your models JSONs to the `models` folder and the animations to the `animations` folder. Then you'll be able to select them in game by selecting `CustomNPC+ GeoModel` as an entity on a Custom NPC. From there simply select your model.json. *Note* You may need to fix the texture of your mob either by URL or by a raw file entered into your modpack to fix the visual misalignment. Then head back to the main `display` page for a CustomNPC. Now, there should be a new button called `Model Animations` in the bottom right, select that and then you can select your Animation JSON and all the subsequent animations from within. (See the images for visual help) ## 🔗 Want to check out my other projects? [CustomNPC+](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/customnpc-plus) is a continuation mod of the famous CustomNpcs Mod for 1.7.10 Featuring various new qualities such as flight, 1.8 Skin Support, enhanced scripting GUIs, and backported features. [CustomNPC+ Dark Mode](https://github.com/KAMKEEL/CustomNPC-Plus-Dark-Mode) is a resource pack for CustomNPC+ that alters all GUIs within the mod to a dark variant that is both clean and pleasing to look at. [MorePlayerModels+](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/moreplayermodels-plus) is a continuation mod of the famous MorePlayerModels Mod for 1.7.10. Featuring backported GUIs, original parts and customizations, permission support and more! [Plugin Mod](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-plugin-mod) is a mod designed to add more aesthetic items for RPG and storytelling. It is compatible with CustomNPC+ and has many items intended to be used and wielded by created NPCs. [RPG Messenger](https://github.com/KAMKEEL/RPGMessenger) is a bukkit plugin designed to allow operators to create messagable NPCs for RPG Servers. Allows a 'RPG Controller' to reply quickly as NPCs, form groupchats, and messagable parties.
